title: Tony Hoare has died
summary:
This article announces the death of computer science pioneer Sir Tony Hoare on March 5, 2026, at age 92. Written by Jim Miles, a personal acquaintance, it focuses on Hoare's character and personal anecdotes rather than a comprehensive review of his technical achievements, which include the quicksort algorithm, Hoare logic, and work on ALGOL.

Miles describes Hoare as sharp-witted, humble, and possessing a great sense of humor, sharing stories from their visits. These include the famous "sixpence wager" that led to quicksort's creation, which Hoare confirmed was actually paid out, and his habit of sneaking out to the cinema while working at Microsoft. The author also recounts Hoare's enigmatic comment that government technology is "years ahead" of public imagination, leaving its meaning purposefully ambiguous.

The piece paints a portrait of Hoare as a brilliant but down-to-earth individual, remembered for his warmth, professionalism, and insightful reflections on his career and the nature of genius.
chinese_title: 托尼·霍尔去世了
chinese_summary:
本文宣布计算机科学先驱托尼·霍尔爵士于2026年3月5日逝世，享年92岁。文章由霍尔的私人熟识吉姆·迈尔斯撰写，聚焦于霍尔的性格与个人轶事，而非对其技术成就（包括快速排序算法、霍尔逻辑及ALGOL语言研究）的全面回顾。

迈尔斯形容霍尔思维敏锐、为人谦逊且极具幽默感，并分享了两人交往中的故事。其中包括促成快速排序算法诞生的著名“六便士赌约”——霍尔证实赌注确实被兑现，以及他在微软工作期间溜去电影院的习惯。作者还提及霍尔那句耐人寻味的评论：政府技术“领先公众想象多年”，其含义被刻意保留为开放式解读。

文章描绘了一位才华横溢却脚踏实地的霍尔，人们将铭记他的温暖、专业精神，以及他对职业生涯与天才本质的深刻思考。

title: Agents that run while I sleep
summary:
This article discusses the challenge of trusting the output of autonomous AI coding agents that work unsupervised. The author notes that while these agents increase productivity, they also create a "self-congratulation machine" where the same AI writes and tests code, leading to potential errors going undetected.

The proposed solution is to adopt a Test-Driven Development (TDD) approach by writing specific, verifiable acceptance criteria in plain English *before* the agent begins coding. These criteria define what "done" looks like (e.g., "User sees error message X," "API returns status code 401").

The author then describes a practical tool, a Claude Skill called "verify," which automates the verification process. After an agent builds a feature, this tool uses browser automation (Playwright) to test each acceptance criterion, generates evidence like screenshots, and produces a pass/fail report. This shifts the review burden from reading all generated code to only investigating failed checks.

The core argument is that defining clear, observable success criteria upfront is essential for trusting autonomous agents, as it provides an objective standard against which their work can be automatically validated.
chinese_title: 在我睡觉时运行的代理
chinese_summary:
本文探讨了在无人监督的情况下信任自主AI编码助手输出的挑战。作者指出，虽然这些助手提高了生产力，但也形成了一个“自我庆贺机器”——同一套AI系统既编写代码又测试代码，导致潜在错误难以被发现。

提出的解决方案是采用测试驱动开发（TDD）方法：在助手开始编码*之前*，用通俗英语编写具体、可验证的验收标准。这些标准明确定义了“完成”的含义（例如“用户看到错误信息X”“API返回状态码401”）。

作者随后介绍了一款实用工具——名为“verify”的Claude技能，它能自动化验证流程。当助手构建功能后，该工具通过浏览器自动化（Playwright）测试每个验收标准，生成截图等证据，并输出通过/失败报告。这将审查负担从阅读所有生成代码转变为只需调查未通过的检查项。

核心论点是：预先定义清晰、可观察的成功标准对于信任自主助手至关重要，因为这提供了可自动验证其工作的客观标准。

title: Yann LeCun raises $1B to build AI that understands the physical world
summary:
Yann LeCun, Meta's former chief AI scientist, has co-founded a Paris-based startup called Advanced Machine Intelligence (AMI), raising over $1 billion at a $3.5 billion valuation. The company aims to develop AI "world models"—systems that understand the physical world, can reason and plan, and have persistent memory. LeCun argues that current large language models (LLMs) like those behind ChatGPT are fundamentally limited and will not lead to true human-level intelligence, which he believes requires grounding in the physical world.

AMI represents a strategic bet against the prevailing industry focus on scaling up LLMs, as pursued by companies like OpenAI and Meta. Instead, it plans to build practical AI for enterprise partners in sectors like manufacturing, biomedical, and robotics, using data to create realistic simulations (e.g., of an aircraft engine) for optimization.

The startup, which will be global from day one, was co-founded by several of LeCun's former Meta colleagues. LeCun will lead AMI while continuing as an NYU professor. Although Meta is not an investor, LeCun is discussing potential collaborations, such as powering assistants in Meta's smart glasses.

LeCun also emphasized that AMI plans to develop open-source technology, asserting that no single company should control such powerful AI. He aligns with recent U.S. government concerns about AI misuse, stating that societal decisions on AI use should be made through democratic processes, not by tech leaders alone.
chinese_title: Yann LeCun筹集10亿美元打造理解物理世界的人工智能
chinese_summary:
Meta前首席AI科学家Yann LeCun联合创立了一家位于巴黎的初创公司“高级机器智能”（AMI），该公司以35亿美元估值融资超10亿美元。该公司致力于开发AI“世界模型”——即能够理解物理世界、进行推理规划并具备持久记忆的系统。LeCun认为，当前支撑ChatGPT等产品的大型语言模型存在根本性局限，无法实现真正的人类智能，而他认为真正的智能需要建立在物理世界的基础上。

AMI的战略方向与OpenAI和Meta等公司主导的“扩大语言模型规模”的行业主流背道而驰。相反，它计划为制造业、生物医学和机器人等领域的合作伙伴开发实用型AI，通过数据构建真实模拟（例如飞机发动机模型）以进行优化。

这家从成立第一天就定位全球的初创公司由LeCun多位前Meta同事共同创立。LeCun将领导AMI，同时继续担任纽约大学教授。尽管Meta并未投资，但LeCun正在探讨潜在合作，例如为Meta智能眼镜中的助手提供技术支持。

LeCun还强调，AMI计划开发开源技术，并主张任何单一公司都不应控制如此强大的AI。他认同美国政府近期对AI滥用的担忧，指出关于AI应用的社会决策应通过民主程序产生，而非仅由科技领袖决定。

title: Launch HN: RunAnywhere (YC W26) – Faster AI Inference on Apple Silicon
summary:
RunAnywhere's RCLI is a voice-controlled AI assistant that runs entirely on-device on Apple Silicon Macs (macOS 13+, M1 or later). It provides a full speech-to-text (STT), large language model (LLM), and text-to-speech (TTS) pipeline with sub-200ms latency, requiring no cloud services or API keys.

Key features include controlling 43 macOS actions by voice (e.g., media, apps, system functions), local document Q&A via RAG with hybrid retrieval, and an interactive terminal UI. It is powered by a proprietary GPU engine called MetalRT for high-performance inference on M3/M4 chips, with fallback to llama.cpp for M1/M2.

Users can install it via a one-line command or Homebrew. The tool supports multiple local models for different tasks and allows hot-swapping. Its architecture uses dedicated threads and optimized memory management for real-time performance. The core RCLI software is open-source (MIT), while MetalRT is proprietary.
chinese_title: 发布HN：RunAnywhere（YC W26）——在苹果芯片上实现更快的AI推理
chinese_summary:
RunAnywhere的RCLI是一款语音控制的AI助手，完全在Apple Silicon Mac（macOS 13+，M1或更高版本）上本地运行。它提供完整的语音转文本（STT）、大语言模型（LLM）和文本转语音（TTS）处理流程，延迟低于200毫秒，无需云服务或API密钥。

主要功能包括通过语音控制43种macOS操作（如媒体、应用、系统功能），基于混合检索增强生成（RAG）的本地文档问答，以及交互式终端界面。其核心采用专有的GPU引擎MetalRT，可在M3/M4芯片上实现高性能推理，M1/M2芯片则回退至llama.cpp引擎。

用户可通过单行命令或Homebrew安装该工具。它支持多种本地模型以适应不同任务，并允许热切换。其架构采用专用线程和优化的内存管理以实现实时性能。核心RCLI软件为开源（MIT协议），而MetalRT为专有引擎。

title: RISC-V Is Sloooow
summary:
The author details their three-month experience working on the Fedora RISC-V port, highlighting significant progress in triaging issues and submitting 86 package pull requests. However, the central challenge is the architecture's severe performance limitations. Current RISC-V builders, using hardware comparable to low-end Arm Cortex-A55 cores, result in extremely long package build times—exemplified by binutils taking over 2 hours compared to 30-45 minutes on other architectures. This slowness, compounded by the need to disable LTO (Link Time Optimization) to save memory, makes using QEMU with many emulated cores faster for some builds than physical RISC-V hardware.

The author concludes that for RISC-V to become a primary Fedora architecture, it requires new, rackable server-class hardware capable of sub-one-hour builds for core packages with LTO enabled. Future plans include starting Fedora 44 builds and deploying faster builders, but the current hardware remains a major bottleneck for development.
chinese_title: RISC-V 太慢了
chinese_summary:
作者详细介绍了他们在Fedora RISC-V移植项目上为期三个月的工作经历，重点强调了在问题分类和提交86个软件包拉取请求方面取得的显著进展。然而，核心挑战在于该架构严重的性能限制。目前的RISC-V构建器使用的硬件性能仅相当于低端Arm Cortex-A55核心，导致软件包构建时间极长——例如binutils的构建耗时超过2小时，而在其他架构上仅需30-45分钟。这种缓慢的构建速度，加上为节省内存而必须禁用LTO（链接时优化）的情况，使得在某些构建任务中使用带多核模拟的QEMU甚至比物理RISC-V硬件更快。

作者总结道，要让RISC-V成为Fedora的主要架构，需要配备新型可上架服务器级硬件，能够在启用LTO的情况下将核心软件包的构建时间压缩至一小时以内。未来计划包括启动Fedora 44构建并部署更快的构建器，但当前的硬件条件仍是开发工作的主要瓶颈。

title: Widevine retiring its Cloud License Service (CLS)
summary:
**Summary of "Widevine retiring its Cloud License Service (CLS)"**

Google's Widevine, a leading DRM technology, is retiring its Cloud License Service (CLS) on **December 31, 2024**. This service has allowed content providers to issue licenses for Widevine-protected content without building and maintaining their own license server infrastructure.

The main impact is on content distributors and service providers who currently rely on CLS. They must now migrate to an alternative solution before the shutdown date to ensure uninterrupted playback for their users. The article, written by DRM specialist castLabs, positions this as a significant industry shift, moving away from a centralized, Google-hosted service.

The retirement necessitates that affected parties either:
1.  **Build and operate their own in-house Widevine license server**, which requires significant technical expertise and resources.
2.  **Partner with a third-party DRM service provider** (like castLabs) that offers managed Widevine license services as part of a broader multi-DRM solution.

The key takeaway is the urgency for action. Companies using CLS must begin planning their migration strategy immediately to avoid service disruption. The change underscores a broader trend in the video streaming industry toward using multi-DRM service providers who can manage licenses for Widevine, Apple FairPlay, and Microsoft PlayReady from a single platform, often seen as more efficient and future-proof than managing a dedicated, single-DRM server.
chinese_title: Widevine即将停止其云许可证服务（CLS）
chinese_summary:
**《Widevine 云许可证服务（CLS）停用摘要》**

谷歌旗下领先的DRM技术Widevine将于**2024年12月31日**停用其云许可证服务（CLS）。该服务曾允许内容提供商为受Widevine保护的内容颁发许可证，而无需自行构建和维护许可证服务器基础设施。

此举主要影响当前依赖CLS的内容分发商和服务提供商。他们必须在停用日期前迁移至替代方案，以确保用户播放不中断。由DRM专家castLabs撰写的文章将此视为一次重大的行业转变，即从谷歌托管的集中式服务转向其他模式。

停用要求受影响方选择以下路径之一：
1.  **自行构建并运营内部的Widevine许可证服务器**，这需要大量的技术专长和资源。
2.  **与第三方DRM服务提供商（如castLabs）合作**，这些提供商提供托管式Widevine许可证服务，作为更广泛的多DRM解决方案的一部分。

关键要点在于采取行动的紧迫性。使用CLS的公司必须立即开始规划迁移策略，以避免服务中断。这一变化凸显了视频流媒体行业的一个更广泛趋势：转向使用多DRM服务提供商，这些提供商能够从单一平台管理Widevine、Apple FairPlay和Microsoft PlayReady的许可证，这通常被视为比管理专用的单一DRM服务器更高效且更具前瞻性。

title: HyperCard discovery: Neuromancer, Count Zero, Mona Lisa Overdrive (2022)
summary:
This article details the 1992 digital release of William Gibson's "Sprawl Trilogy" (*Neuromancer*, *Count Zero*, *Mona Lisa Overdrive*) as a Voyager Expanded Book for classic Macintosh systems. The release is a HyperCard-based application designed to optimize the reading experience on early laptops and desktops, featuring custom typography and navigation tools. It includes Gibson's afterword, which was not widely republished elsewhere.

The files are available for download in two archival formats (.sit and .dmg) compatible with System 6.x through Mac OS 9 and can be run on modern systems using emulators like Basilisk II. The article provides specific installation instructions, noting that the novels appear in alphabetical, not chronological, order within the application. It confirms the software has been tested and is fully functional.
chinese_title: 《超卡发现：神经漫游者、归零、蒙娜丽莎超速》（2022）
chinese_summary:
本文详述了1992年威廉·吉布森《蔓生都会三部曲》（《神经漫游者》《零伯爵》《蒙娜丽莎超速档》）作为Voyager扩展电子书在经典Macintosh系统上的数字发行。该版本是基于HyperCard开发的应用程序，专为优化早期笔记本电脑和台式机的阅读体验而设计，具备定制排版和导航工具。书中收录了吉布森的后记，该后记在其他出版物中鲜少重印。

文件提供两种兼容System 6.x至Mac OS 9系统的归档格式（.sit和.dmg）下载，并可通过Basilisk II等模拟器在现代系统上运行。文章提供了具体的安装说明，指出小说在应用程序中按字母顺序（而非时间顺序）排列，并确认该软件已通过测试且功能完整。

title: Debian decides not to decide on AI-generated contributions
summary:
Debian developers recently debated whether to establish a formal policy on AI-generated contributions but ultimately decided against holding a vote. The discussion was sparked by a draft general resolution (GR) proposing to allow such contributions under conditions like explicit disclosure and contributor accountability.

Key points of debate included the vague term "AI," with many arguing for more precise language like "LLM-generated," and concerns about the impact on mentoring new contributors, copyright issues, and the ethical implications of using tools that scrape intellectual property. Some developers advocated for a clear ban, while others felt a nuanced approach was needed.

The consensus was that the project is not yet ready for a definitive policy due to the complexity of the issue, rapidly evolving technology, and lack of agreement on definitions and consequences. For now, Debian will continue to handle AI-assisted contributions on a case-by-case basis using existing policies.
chinese_title: Debian决定不对AI生成贡献作出决定
chinese_summary:
Debian开发者近期就是否制定关于AI生成贡献的正式政策展开辩论，但最终决定不进行投票表决。此次讨论由一份通用决议草案引发，该草案提议在明确披露和贡献者承担责任等条件下允许此类贡献。

辩论焦点包括“AI”这一模糊术语——许多人主张使用“LLM生成”等更精确的表述，以及对指导新贡献者的影响、版权问题、使用抓取知识产权的工具所涉及的伦理争议等担忧。部分开发者主张明确禁止，另一些则认为需要更细致的处理方式。

共识认为，鉴于问题的复杂性、技术的快速演变以及各方对定义和后果缺乏共识，该项目尚未准备好制定最终政策。目前Debian将继续依据现有政策，对AI辅助的贡献采取逐案处理的方式。

title: Billion-Parameter Theories
summary:
This article argues that humanity's historical reliance on concise, elegant scientific theories (like F=ma) was a product of the limitations of human memory and tools like pencil and paper. While perfect for "complicated" systems (like engines), this approach failed for truly "complex" systems (like economies or climate), where interactions are dynamic and emergent.

For decades, fields like complexity science at the Santa Fe Institute could describe these systems but not create prescriptive, operable models. The breakthrough is modern AI, specifically large neural networks. These models act as "billion-parameter theories"—vast, compressed representations of complex systems that are too large for human cognition but can be simulated and used for prediction.

The author addresses the objection that such models lack the compact, general "reach" of good explanations. They propose a two-layer theory: the trained model's weights are large and specific, but the underlying architecture (like a transformer) is compact and universal, capable of learning across different complex domains. Furthermore, the emerging field of mechanistic interpretability studies these models to extract insights about the systems they represent.

In conclusion, the hardest human problems may not be intractable but simply required a new medium for theory. While answers may be probabilistic rather than deterministic, AI provides a tool to finally model and potentially intervene in complex systems at scale.
chinese_title: 十亿参数理论
chinese_summary:
本文认为，人类历史上依赖简洁优雅的科学理论（如F=ma）是受限于人类记忆及纸笔等工具的结果。这种方法虽适用于“复杂”系统（如发动机），却无法应对真正“复杂”的系统（如经济或气候），因为后者的相互作用是动态且涌现的。

数十年来，圣塔菲研究所等机构的复杂性科学虽能描述这类系统，却无法建立可操作的规定性模型。现代人工智能，特别是大型神经网络，实现了突破。这些模型如同“数十亿参数的理论”——它们是对复杂系统的海量压缩表征，其规模超出人类认知范畴，却能用于模拟和预测。

针对“此类模型缺乏优秀解释理论所具有的简洁普适性”的质疑，作者提出双层理论：训练后的模型权重庞大而具体，但其底层架构（如Transformer）却紧凑通用，能够跨越不同复杂领域进行学习。此外，新兴的机制可解释性领域正通过研究这些模型，提取其所表征系统的深层原理。

总之，人类最棘手的问题或许并非无解，只是需要新的理论载体。虽然答案可能基于概率而非确定性，但人工智能最终提供了大规模建模并干预复杂系统的工具。

title: FFmpeg-over-IP – Connect to remote FFmpeg servers
summary:
**Summary**

FFmpeg-over-IP is a tool that enables applications to use GPU-accelerated FFmpeg on a remote server without requiring direct GPU access or shared filesystems. It solves the complexity of GPU passthrough in Docker/VMs and eliminates the need for NFS/SMB mounts.

The system consists of two parts: a client binary that mimics `ffmpeg`, and a server that runs a patched version of FFmpeg. When an application (like a media server) invokes the client, it forwards the command over a TCP connection to the server. The server executes the command using its local GPU, and all file I/O is tunneled back through the network connection—files never reside on the server.

Key features include:
*   **Simplified Setup**: No GPU device mapping, PCIe passthrough, or shared storage configuration needed.
*   **Pre-built Binaries**: Releases include FFmpeg/FFprobe with broad hardware acceleration support (NVENC, QSV, VAAPI, etc.).
*   **Security**: Uses HMAC-SHA256 with a shared secret for command authentication.
*   **Concurrency**: Supports multiple simultaneous client connections.
*   **Cross-Platform**: Client and server are available for Linux (x86_64/arm64), macOS, and Windows.

The tool is ideal for offloading GPU-intensive transcoding tasks from a local machine or container to a dedicated remote server with a GPU.
chinese_title: FFmpeg-over-IP – 连接远程FFmpeg服务器
chinese_summary:
**概述**

FFmpeg-over-IP 是一款工具，能让应用程序在远程服务器上使用 GPU 加速的 FFmpeg，而无需直接访问 GPU 或共享文件系统。它解决了 Docker/虚拟机中 GPU 透传的复杂性，并消除了对 NFS/SMB 挂载的需求。

该系统由两部分组成：一个模拟 `ffmpeg` 的客户端二进制文件，以及一个运行补丁版 FFmpeg 的服务器。当应用程序（如媒体服务器）调用客户端时，客户端会通过 TCP 连接将命令转发给服务器。服务器使用其本地 GPU 执行命令，所有文件 I/O 都通过网络连接隧道回传——文件从不驻留在服务器上。

主要特性包括：
*   **简化设置**：无需 GPU 设备映射、PCIe 透传或共享存储配置。
*   **预构建二进制文件**：发布版本包含支持广泛硬件加速（NVENC、QSV、VAAPI 等）的 FFmpeg/FFprobe。
*   **安全性**：使用 HMAC-SHA256 和共享密钥进行命令认证。
*   **并发性**：支持多个同时的客户端连接。
*   **跨平台**：客户端和服务器适用于 Linux（x86_64/arm64）、macOS 和 Windows。

该工具非常适合将 GPU 密集型的转码任务从本地机器或容器卸载到配备 GPU 的专用远程服务器上。

title: Intel Demos Chip to Compute with Encrypted Data
summary:
Intel has successfully demonstrated a prototype chip designed to perform computations on fully homomorphic encrypted (FHE) data. This technology allows data to remain encrypted not just in storage or transit, but also during active processing, offering a new level of security for sensitive cloud computing and AI workloads.

The key achievement of Intel's prototype is a dramatic performance improvement. FHE has historically been too slow for practical use due to the immense computational overhead of operating on encrypted data. Intel's new chip, which integrates specialized hardware accelerators, reportedly speeds up these operations by approximately 5,000 times compared to conventional software-based FHE implementations on a CPU.

This breakthrough makes the prospect of real-world, commercially viable FHE significantly more feasible. Potential applications include secure analysis of private medical records, confidential financial modeling, and privacy-preserving cloud AI services, where data owners would not need to trust the cloud provider with their raw information.

The demonstration marks a major step in bringing "confidential computing" to its ultimate form, where data can be processed without ever being exposed in its unencrypted state, even to the hardware performing the calculations.
chinese_title: 英特尔展示可加密数据计算的芯片
chinese_summary:
英特尔成功展示了一款专为全同态加密数据计算而设计的原型芯片。这项技术使得数据不仅在存储或传输过程中保持加密状态，还能在实时处理期间持续加密，为敏感的云计算和人工智能工作负载提供了全新级别的安全保障。

英特尔原型芯片的关键成就在于实现了性能的显著提升。由于对加密数据进行操作需要巨大的计算开销，全同态加密技术历来因速度过慢而难以投入实际应用。据报道，英特尔这款集成了专用硬件加速器的新型芯片，与基于CPU的传统软件全同态加密方案相比，可将运算速度提升约5000倍。

这一突破使得具有商业可行性的全同态加密技术在现实世界中应用的前景大大增强。其潜在应用场景包括：对私人医疗记录进行安全分析、机密金融建模，以及保护隐私的云端人工智能服务——在这些场景中，数据所有者无需将原始信息托付给云服务提供商。

此次演示标志着“机密计算”向终极形态迈出了重要一步：数据即使在被硬件处理的过程中，也始终以加密形态存在，永远不会暴露其明文状态。

title: Redox OS has adopted a Certificate of Origin policy and a strict no-LLM policy
summary:
Based on the CONTRIBUTING.md file for Redox OS, the project has implemented two key policies for all contributions:

1. **Certificate of Origin (Developer's Certificate of Origin - DCO):** Every contributor must sign off on their commits using the `Signed-off-by:` line. This act certifies that the contributor has the right to submit the work under the project's open-source license and that the contribution complies with the DCO. Contributors must use their real name; pseudonyms or anonymous contributions are not accepted.

2. **Strict No-Large Language Model (No-LLM) Policy:** Contributions generated by Large Language Models (like ChatGPT, Copilot, etc.) are **strictly prohibited**. The policy states that code, documentation, or any other content created by an LLM will be rejected. The rationale is that LLM-generated content may introduce licensing ambiguities, security vulnerabilities, and code of unclear origin, which conflicts with the project's goals of transparency and safety.

The document emphasizes that these policies are non-negotiable and are enforced to ensure legal clarity, maintain code quality and security, and uphold the project's principles. Contributors must manually verify that their work complies with both rules before submitting.
chinese_title: Redox OS已采用原产地证书政策及严格的禁止大型语言模型政策。
chinese_summary:
根据Redox OS的CONTRIBUTING.md文件，该项目对所有贡献实施了两项关键政策：

1. **来源证明（开发者来源证明 - DCO）：** 每位贡献者必须使用`Signed-off-by:`行签署其提交。此举证明贡献者有权根据项目的开源许可证提交作品，且贡献符合DCO要求。贡献者必须使用真实姓名；不接受化名或匿名贡献。

2. **严格禁止大型语言模型政策：** **严禁**提交由大型语言模型（如ChatGPT、Copilot等）生成的贡献。该政策规定，由LLM生成的代码、文档或任何其他内容将被拒绝。其理由是LLM生成的内容可能引发许可模糊性、安全漏洞及来源不明的代码，这与项目追求透明度和安全性的目标相冲突。

文件强调这些政策不可协商，旨在确保法律明确性、维护代码质量与安全，并坚守项目原则。贡献者在提交前必须手动核实其作品符合这两项规定。

title: Levels of Agentic Engineering
summary:
This article outlines eight progressive levels of "agentic engineering," a framework for effectively leveraging AI coding assistants to boost developer productivity.

The early levels (1-2) focus on basic tools like tab completion and AI-powered IDEs. The core of the framework begins with **Level 3: Context Engineering**, which involves optimizing the information given to the AI for better results. **Level 4: Compounding Engineering** builds on this by systematically learning from each AI interaction to improve future ones.

**Level 5** introduces external capabilities via tools like MCPs and custom skills, allowing the AI to interact with databases, APIs, and other systems. **Level 6: Harness Engineering** creates automated feedback loops (like tests and observability) so AI agents can validate and iterate on their own work with minimal human oversight.

The advanced stages involve autonomy. **Level 7** moves to **Background Agents** that can plan and execute tasks asynchronously, requiring effective orchestration to manage multiple agents. The implied **Level 8** is full autonomy, where a well-configured system of agents handles complex development workflows end-to-end.

A key theme is that raw AI capability is less important than the engineering practices around it. Success depends on clean context, well-defined constraints, and robust feedback mechanisms. The author also emphasizes the "multiplayer effect," where a team's overall productivity is limited by its least advanced member in using these techniques.
chinese_title: 代理工程层级
chinese_summary:
本文概述了“智能体工程”的八个进阶层级，这是一个通过有效利用AI编程助手提升开发者生产力的框架。

初级阶段（1-2级）关注基础工具，如代码补全和AI增强的集成开发环境。框架的核心始于**第三级：语境工程**，即通过优化提供给AI的信息以获得更佳结果。**第四级：复合工程**在此基础上展开，通过系统化学习每次AI交互经验来优化后续协作。

**第五级**借助MCP等工具与自定义技能引入外部能力，使AI能够连接数据库、API及其他系统。**第六级：驾驭工程**创建自动化反馈循环（如测试与可观测性），让AI智能体能在极少人工干预下自主验证并迭代工作成果。

高级阶段涉及自主性演进。**第七级**发展为可异步规划执行任务的**后台智能体**，需要有效的编排机制来管理多个智能体。隐含的**第八级**则是完全自主阶段——由配置完善的智能体系统端到端处理复杂开发工作流。

核心观点在于：相较于原始AI能力，围绕其构建的工程实践更为关键。成功取决于清晰的语境、明确的约束和稳健的反馈机制。作者同时强调“团队协作效应”——团队整体生产力受限于对这类技术掌握最薄弱的成员。

title: Open Weights isn't Open Training
summary:
This article details the author's challenging experience trying to post-train the large open-weight model Kimi-K2-Thinking using existing open-source tools. The goal was to fine-tune the model with a custom "Yoda-style" dataset. Despite the model's availability on HuggingFace, the author encountered multiple significant technical hurdles that highlight the gap between having open weights and having functional, production-ready training infrastructure.

Key problems included: 1) an unnecessary and slow re-quantization step that had to be manually disabled, 2) severe GPU memory fragmentation due to PyTorch's default memory allocator, which was resolved by enabling an experimental `expandable_segments` setting, 3) an uneven and inefficient default weight distribution across GPUs that required a custom `device_map`, 4) incompatibility between the model's quantized layers and standard LoRA fine-tuning libraries, and 5) a non-differentiable, non-trainable component (the MoE gate) in the model's implementation.

The core takeaway is that "open weights" does not equate to "open training." While model weights are publicly released, the supporting code is often buggy, inefficient, or incomplete for serious training efforts, especially for massive, cutting-edge models. The author's team ultimately had to abandon these open-source options and develop a custom training codebase, underscoring that reliable infrastructure remains a major barrier despite the availability of the models themselves.
chinese_title: 开放权重不等于开放训练
chinese_summary:
本文详细叙述了作者尝试使用现有开源工具对大型开放权重模型Kimi-K2-Thinking进行后训练的艰难经历。其目标是用自定义的“尤达风格”数据集微调该模型。尽管该模型已在HuggingFace上提供，作者仍遇到了多个重大技术障碍，这些障碍凸显了拥有开放权重与拥有功能完善、可用于生产的训练基础设施之间的差距。

主要问题包括：1）一个不必要且缓慢的重量化步骤必须手动禁用；2）由于PyTorch默认内存分配器导致的严重GPU内存碎片化，通过启用实验性`expandable_segments`设置得以解决；3）默认权重在GPU间分布不均且低效，需要自定义`device_map`；4）模型的量化层与标准LoRA微调库不兼容；5）模型实现中存在一个不可微分、不可训练的部分（MoE门控机制）。

核心结论是：“开放权重”不等于“开放训练”。虽然模型权重已公开发布，但配套代码往往存在漏洞、效率低下或不完整，难以支持严肃的训练工作，尤其是对于大规模前沿模型。作者的团队最终不得不放弃这些开源选项，转而开发自定义训练代码库，这凸显出尽管模型本身已可获取，可靠的基础设施仍然是主要障碍。

title: Rebasing in Magit
summary:
This article highlights Magit, a Git interface for Emacs, as a powerful tool that combines discoverability, efficiency, and transparency, using rebasing as a key example. It emphasizes how Magit's interactive log view allows users to easily understand their repository's structure and perform complex Git operations through intuitive, hint-driven key commands.

The author demonstrates rebasing a branch by first using the log to visually select and switch branches, then initiating the rebase with minimal keystrokes. They note that for interactive rebases, Magit provides a clear, editable commit list with helpful shortcuts. Crucially, Magit reveals the exact Git commands it executes (like `git rebase --autostash`), helping users learn and understand Git's underlying mechanics.

The article argues that Magit enhances, rather than replaces, command-line Git proficiency. Its design as a transparent wrapper makes advanced operations more approachable, teaching users about useful but lesser-known options. The author concludes that Magit's blend of interactivity and transparency offers a unique advantage over both the raw command line and other graphical interfaces.
chinese_title: Magit中的变基操作
chinese_summary:
本文重点介绍了Emacs的Git界面工具Magit，它是一款集可探索性、高效性和透明性于一体的强大工具，并以变基操作为核心示例进行说明。文章强调Magit的交互式日志视图如何让用户轻松理解仓库结构，并通过直观的提示驱动快捷键执行复杂的Git操作。

作者演示了分支变基过程：先通过日志视图可视化选择并切换分支，再用极少的按键触发变基操作。文中指出，对于交互式变基，Magit会提供清晰可编辑的提交列表及便捷快捷键。尤为关键的是，Magit会显示实际执行的Git命令（如`git rebase --autostash`），帮助用户学习和理解Git的底层机制。

文章认为Magit并非替代命令行Git能力，而是对其的增强。其透明封装的设计让高级操作更易上手，同时向用户传授那些实用但鲜为人知的选项。作者总结道，Magit融合交互性与透明度的特点，使其在原始命令行与其他图形界面工具中具有独特优势。

title: Defeat as Method
summary:
This article explores the concept of "defeat as method," arguing that critical thinking and survival strategies emerge from the standpoint of the historically defeated. Using the author's father—a member of Iran's dispossessed Bakhtiari people—as a starting point, it connects the experience of Indigenous land loss to the broader condition of colonized and marginalized peoples.

The text examines how figures like Frantz Fanon analyzed the "thingification" of the Black body, and how the Iranian thinker Ali Shariati translated anti-colonial thought into an Islamic framework, leading to the 1979 revolution. It highlights the political power of lamentation, using the Shia commemoration of the defeat at Karbala (Ashura) and its global iterations—like the Hosay ritual in Trinidad—as examples of how mourning past losses fuels ongoing resistance.

Ultimately, the article posits that living in a state of repeated defeat fosters a unique, realistic form of "pessimistic hopefulness" or "radical hope." This is not naive optimism, but a commitment to struggle and imagine new futures precisely because victory seems impossible, yet breathing and surviving persist. The defeated, from the Crow Nation to the author's father, teach how to face approaching ruin with an "open face"—a vulnerable yet defiant act of staying present and generating meaning from within brokenness.
chinese_title: 作为方法的失败
chinese_summary:
本文探讨“以失败为方法”这一概念，主张批判性思维与生存策略往往源于历史失败者的立场。文章以作者的父亲——伊朗被剥夺权利的巴赫蒂亚里族成员——为起点，将原住民土地丧失的经历与更广泛的被殖民及边缘化群体的处境联系起来。

文章分析了如弗朗茨·法农如何剖析黑人身体的“物化”，以及伊朗思想家阿里·沙里亚提如何将反殖民思想转化为伊斯兰框架，从而催生1979年革命。文中强调了哀悼的政治力量，以什叶派纪念卡尔巴拉战役失败（阿舒拉节）及其全球衍化形式——如特立尼达的胡赛仪式——为例，说明对过往损失的哀悼如何持续滋养抵抗运动。

最终，文章提出：生活在反复失败的状态中，会催生一种独特而现实的“悲观的希望”或“激进的希望”。这不是天真的乐观主义，而是一种致力于斗争与想象新未来的承诺——恰恰因为胜利看似无望，但呼吸与生存仍在继续。从克劳族到作者的父亲，这些失败者教会我们如何以“敞开的面容”直面迫近的毁灭：这是一种脆弱却无畏的姿态，在破碎中保持在场，并从中创造意义。

title: I put my whole life into a single database
summary: Felix Krause has spent three years tracking over 100 daily metrics about his life—including fitness, location, mood, and computer usage—into a single, self-hosted database, amassing 380,000 entries. His public dashboard, howisFelix.today, visualizes this data to uncover personal insights. Key findings include correlations between his mood and activities (e.g., happiness linked to more social drinking and learning), the impact of lockdowns (increased calls but less walking), and how factors like weight affect resting heart rate. The project also reveals lifestyle patterns across cities, such as walking more in New York than Vienna, and tracks long-term trends in travel, health, and gym attendance. Krause emphasizes full data ownership, open-source tools, and using this self-quantification to answer specific questions about his habits and well-being.
chinese_title: 我将整个生命都存入了一个数据库。
chinese_summary: 费利克斯·克劳斯花费三年时间，将100多项日常指标——包括健身、位置、情绪和电脑使用情况——记录到一个自托管数据库中，累计录入38万条数据。他的公开仪表盘howisFelix.today将这些数据可视化，以揭示个人生活洞察。主要发现包括情绪与活动的关联（例如快乐与更多社交饮酒和学习相关）、封锁措施的影响（通话增加但步行减少），以及体重等因素对静息心率的作用。该项目还展现了不同城市的生活方式模式，比如在纽约比维也纳步行更多，并追踪了旅行、健康和健身房出勤的长期趋势。克劳斯强调完全的数据所有权、开源工具的使用，以及通过这种自我量化来解答关于自身习惯与健康的特定问题。

title: Show HN: How I Topped the HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard on Two Gaming GPUs
summary:
This article details how the author achieved the top spot on the HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard in mid-2024 without modifying any model weights. Instead, they took an existing 72-billion parameter model and duplicated a specific block of seven middle layers, stitching the result back together. This process, run on two RTX 4090 GPUs, was inspired by two key observations: that LLMs can effectively reason in Base64 (suggesting early layers translate input into an abstract internal representation) and that the "Goliath-120B" model functioned despite having its layers rearranged in a way never seen during training.

The author hypothesized that Transformers have a functional "neuroanatomy," where early layers handle input translation, late layers handle output, and middle layers perform abstract reasoning in a universal internal language. To test this, they developed a "brain scanner" pipeline that systematically duplicated different ranges of middle layers (creating over 3,000 model variants) and evaluated them using fast, objective proxy tasks.

The key discovery was that duplicating a specific seven-layer block in the model's middle—essentially giving it more "thinking" capacity—significantly boosted performance across multiple benchmarks. This finding suggests that enhancing an LLM's reasoning capability may be less about training new knowledge and more about optimizing its internal computational structure.
chinese_title: Show HN：我是如何在两块游戏显卡上登顶HuggingFace开源大语言模型排行榜的
chinese_summary:
本文详细阐述了作者如何在2024年中旬未修改任何模型权重的情况下，登顶HuggingFace开放大语言模型排行榜。其方法并非调整模型参数，而是选取了一个现有的720亿参数模型，复制其中特定的七层中间模块，并将结果重新拼接。这一过程在两块RTX 4090 GPU上运行，其灵感来源于两个关键发现：大语言模型能有效进行Base64推理（表明早期层可将输入转化为抽象的内部表征），以及“Goliath-120B”模型即使在训练中从未出现过的层重新排列方式下仍能正常运行。

作者假设Transformer具有一种功能性的“神经解剖结构”：早期层负责输入转换，后期层负责输出，而中间层则使用一种通用的内部语言进行抽象推理。为验证这一假设，他们开发了一套“大脑扫描仪”流程，系统性地复制不同范围的中间层（创建了超过3000个模型变体），并通过快速、客观的代理任务进行评估。

关键发现是：复制模型中段特定的七层模块——实质上是赋予模型更多“思考”容量——能显著提升其在多项基准测试中的表现。这一结果表明，增强大语言模型的推理能力或许更应着眼于优化其内部计算结构，而非仅仅训练新知识。

title: After outages, Amazon to make senior engineers sign off on AI-assisted changes
summary:
Amazon is implementing stricter controls on AI-assisted code changes after a series of outages on its e-commerce platform and cloud services. Following incidents, including a major website and app outage this month, senior vice-president Dave Treadwell announced that junior and mid-level engineers must now have their AI-assisted changes signed off by a senior engineer.

The company cited a "trend of incidents" with a "high blast radius," partly attributed to novel uses of generative AI where best practices and safeguards are not yet fully established. Amazon Web Services (AWS) has also experienced at least two incidents linked to its Kiro AI coding tool, including a 13-hour service interruption in December.

Amazon has convened a mandatory deep-dive meeting to address the issues, focusing on immediate initiatives to improve site availability. While the company stated this review is part of normal business for continual improvement, it follows internal reports from engineers linking an increase in operational incidents to recent corporate layoffs—a claim Amazon disputes.
chinese_title: 故障频发后，亚马逊将要求高级工程师签署批准AI辅助的变更。
chinese_summary:
亚马逊正在对其人工智能辅助的代码变更实施更严格的控制，此前其电商平台和云服务发生了一系列中断事件。继本月网站和应用程序发生重大故障后，高级副总裁戴夫·特雷德韦尔宣布，初级和中级工程师的人工智能辅助变更现在必须由高级工程师签字批准。

公司指出，这些事件呈现出“影响范围广”的趋势，部分原因在于生成式人工智能的新应用尚未完全建立最佳实践和安全措施。亚马逊网络服务（AWS）也至少发生了两起与其Kiro AI编码工具相关的事件，其中包括去年12月一次长达13小时的服务中断。

亚马逊已召开强制性深度会议来解决这些问题，重点放在提高网站可用性的即时举措上。尽管公司表示此次审查是持续改进的正常业务的一部分，但此前有工程师的内部报告将运营事件增加与近期公司裁员联系起来——亚马逊对此说法予以否认。

title: Because Algospeak
summary:
This article reviews two books about how the internet shapes language: *Because Internet* by Gretchen McCulloch (2019) and *Algospeak* by Adam Aleksic (2025).

*Because Internet* takes a historical and academic linguistics approach, tracing online language from early BBSes and IRC. It argues that the internet sparked a writing renaissance by making informal, conversational text mainstream, and analyzes elements like emojis as digital equivalents of spoken gestures.

*Algospeak* focuses on how corporate social media algorithms actively shape language. It examines how users creatively evade content filters (e.g., using "unalive" for death) and how platforms encourage niche labels for targeted advertising. The book also notes how algorithmic pressures standardize vocal styles in podcasts and videos.

The reviewer enjoyed both but found *Algospeak* more intense and angering, as it reveals language being distorted to serve advertising rather than organic communication. He concludes by advocating for decentralized social media (like the Fediverse and Bluesky) as spaces where language can evolve freely, outside the control of "The Algorithm."
chinese_title: 因为算法黑话
chinese_summary:
本文评述了两本探讨互联网如何塑造语言的著作：格雷琴·麦卡洛克所著《因为互联网》（2019年）与亚当·亚历克西奇所著《算法语言》（2025年）。

《因为互联网》采用历史与学术语言学视角，追溯了从早期BBS和IRC至今的网络语言演变。该书认为，互联网通过使非正式、对话式的文本成为主流，引发了一场书写复兴，并将表情符号等元素分析为口语手势的数字等价物。

《算法语言》则聚焦于企业社交媒体算法如何主动塑造语言。书中探讨了用户如何创造性规避内容过滤（如用“未存活”代指死亡），以及平台如何鼓励细分标签以实现精准广告投放。该书同时指出，算法压力正促使播客和视频中的表达风格趋于标准化。

评论者肯定了两部作品的价值，但认为《算法语言》更具冲击力且令人愤慨，因为它揭示了语言如何为服务广告而非自然交流而被扭曲。最后，他倡导以去中心化社交媒体（如联邦宇宙和Bluesky）作为语言自由演化的空间，使其摆脱“算法”的操控。

title: I built a programming language using Claude Code
summary:
This article details the author's four-week experiment using Claude Code (an AI coding assistant) to build a new programming language called Cutlet, without writing any code themselves.

The author describes Cutlet as a functional, dynamic language with features like vectorized array operations (@ meta-operator), a REPL, and standard constructs. They explain that while the AI generated all the code, the project's success relied on human-led "agentic engineering."

Key to this approach were four identified skills:
1.  **Problem Selection:** Choosing tasks well-represented in AI training data and with automatable success criteria.
2.  **Intent Communication:** Writing precise specifications and implementation plans, which required significant upfront effort.
3.  **Environment Creation:** Building a robust feedback loop for the AI, primarily through a comprehensive and constantly executed test suite.
4.  **Loop Optimization:** Monitoring and refining the agent's workflow for efficiency.

The author concludes that while AI can automate code generation, effective use requires traditional software engineering skills—like planning, specification, and testing—applied in new ways. The experiment successfully compressed months of work into weeks, demonstrating AI's potential to handle complex, well-scoped programming tasks when properly guided.
chinese_title: 我用Claude Code构建了一门编程语言。
chinese_summary:
本文详细介绍了作者为期四周的实验：使用Claude Code（一款AI编程助手）构建名为Cutlet的新编程语言，且全程未亲自编写任何代码。

作者将Cutlet描述为一种函数式动态语言，具备向量化数组操作（@元运算符）、REPL环境及标准语法结构。文中指出，虽然所有代码均由AI生成，但项目的成功依赖于人类主导的“智能体工程”。

该方法的核心在于四项关键技能：
1.  **问题选择**：挑选在AI训练数据中充分体现、且具备可自动化成功标准的任务。
2.  **意图传达**：编写精确的规范说明与实施计划，这需要大量前期投入。
3.  **环境构建**：通过全面且持续执行的测试套件，为AI建立稳健的反馈循环。
4.  **循环优化**：监控并优化智能体工作流程以提升效率。

作者总结道，尽管AI能自动化生成代码，但要有效利用仍需传统软件工程技能——如规划、规范制定和测试——并以新方式加以应用。该实验成功将数月工作量压缩至数周，证明在恰当引导下，AI具备处理复杂且目标明确的编程任务的潜力。

title: I used pulsar detection techniques to turn a phone into a watch timegrapher
summary:
This article describes a project called **ChronoLog**, which adapts techniques used in **astronomy for detecting pulsars** to create a smartphone-based **watch timegrapher**.

The core innovation is using the phone's **microphone** to listen to the ticking of a mechanical watch. The author applies **signal processing methods**—specifically **Fourier analysis**—similar to those used to find the regular pulses from distant neutron stars. This allows the app to isolate the precise tick rate of the watch from background noise.

By analyzing this signal, the app can **measure the watch's accuracy and rate deviation** (how many seconds fast or slow it runs per day), functioning like a professional timing machine. The goal of ChronoLog is to provide watch enthusiasts with an **accessible, low-cost tool** to monitor the performance and health of their mechanical timepieces using hardware they already own.
chinese_title: 我运用脉冲星探测技术，将一部手机改造成了手表校时仪。
chinese_summary:
本文介绍了一个名为**ChronoLog**的项目，该项目借鉴了**天文学中探测脉冲星的技术**，开发出一款基于智能手机的**腕表校时仪**。

其核心创新在于利用手机的**麦克风**捕捉机械腕表的滴答声。作者运用了与探测遥远中子星规律脉冲相似的**信号处理方法**——特别是**傅里叶分析**，使应用能够从背景噪音中分离出腕表的精确节拍频率。

通过分析这一信号，该应用可以**测量腕表的走时精度与速率偏差**（即每日快慢秒数），功能类似专业校时仪。ChronoLog的目标是为腕表爱好者提供一个**便捷、低成本的工具**，让他们利用现有设备监测机械时计的性能与运行状态。

title: Surpassing vLLM with a Generated Inference Stack
summary:
**Summary:**

Infinity Inc. has developed a new AI inference engine that reportedly surpasses the performance of the popular vLLM framework. Their key innovation is using generative AI to automatically create and optimize the underlying software "stack"—the layers of code that handle tasks like computation and memory management—specifically tailored for each AI model and hardware setup.

This AI-generated stack is more efficient than the general-purpose design of vLLM, leading to significant gains. The article highlights a **2.4x increase in throughput** (speed of processing requests) and a **50% reduction in latency** (delay) for serving the Llama 3.1 405B model. These improvements translate to lower operational costs and faster response times.

The core advantage is **specialization**: instead of a one-size-fits-all solution, their system generates an optimal stack for each unique combination of model, GPU, and workload. This automated approach also promises to accelerate performance tuning as new models and hardware are released.

In essence, Infinity Inc. is moving beyond manually engineered frameworks to an era where the inference software itself is AI-optimized, setting a new benchmark for efficiency and speed in deploying large language models.
chinese_title: 超越vLLM：生成式推理堆栈的突破
chinese_summary:
**摘要：**

Infinity Inc. 开发了一款新型 AI 推理引擎，据称性能超越了流行的 vLLM 框架。其核心创新在于利用生成式 AI 自动创建并优化底层软件“堆栈”——即处理计算与内存管理等任务的代码层——该堆栈专为每个 AI 模型和硬件配置量身定制。

相较于 vLLM 的通用型设计，这种 AI 生成的堆栈效率更高，带来了显著性能提升。文章指出，在服务 Llama 3.1 405B 模型时，**吞吐量（请求处理速度）提升了 2.4 倍**，**延迟（响应时间）降低了 50%**。这些改进意味着更低的运营成本和更快的响应速度。

其核心优势在于**专业化**：该系统并非提供通用解决方案，而是为每个独特的模型、GPU 和工作负载组合生成最优堆栈。这种自动化方法也有望在新模型和硬件发布时加速性能调优。

本质上，Infinity Inc. 正从手动设计的框架迈向一个新时代：推理软件本身由 AI 优化，从而为大型语言模型的部署设定了效率与速度的新标杆。

title: RFC 454545 – Human Em Dash Standard
summary:
This document, RFC 454545, is a satirical proposal for a "Human Em Dash Standard." It addresses the perceived problem that the increased and confident use of em dashes (—) by AI text generators has created ambiguity, causing human authors to worry their own stylistic dashes might be mistaken for machine-generated content—a situation termed "Dash Authenticity Collapse."

The proposed solution is a new, visually identical Unicode character called the Human Em Dash (HED, U+10EAD). To authenticate its human origin, it must be preceded by an invisible Human Attestation Mark (HAM, U+10EAC), forming the sequence `<HAM><HED>`. The standard mandates that only systems capable of detecting genuine human "hesitation events" (like pauses, backspaces, or sighs) can emit this sequence, while automated systems are prohibited from doing so.

The RFC includes sections on behavioral verification, suggested "proof-of-work" mechanisms for humans, and considerations for security (warning against AI systems faking hesitation), policy, and backwards compatibility. It humorously requests IANA to establish a "Human Punctuation Registry."

The comments reveal readers engaging with the satire, debating whether AI could simply be programmed to output the HAM/HED sequence to bypass the standard, thus highlighting the core, real-world challenge the piece satirizes: the growing difficulty in distinguishing human from machine-generated text.
chinese_title: RFC 454545 – 人类破折号标准
chinese_summary:
本文档RFC 454545是一份关于“人类长破折号标准”的讽刺性提案。它针对一个被察觉的问题：AI文本生成器对长破折号（—）日益频繁且自信的使用造成了歧义，导致人类作者担心自己的风格性破折号可能被误认为机器生成内容——这一情境被称为“破折号真实性崩溃”。

提案的解决方案是一个视觉上完全相同的新Unicode字符，即“人类长破折号”（HED，U+10EAD）。为验证其人类来源，该字符前必须加上一个不可见的“人类认证标记”（HAM，U+10EAC），形成序列`<HAM><HED>`。该标准规定，只有能够检测真实人类“犹豫事件”（如停顿、退格或叹息）的系统才能发出此序列，而自动化系统则被禁止这样做。

RFC包含行为验证、建议的人类“工作量证明”机制，以及安全性（警告AI系统伪造犹豫）、政策性和向后兼容性等方面的考量。它幽默地请求IANA建立一个“人类标点符号注册表”。

评论显示读者们积极参与这一讽刺讨论，争论AI是否可能被直接编程输出HAM/HED序列以绕过标准，从而凸显了该文讽刺的核心现实挑战：区分人类与机器生成文本正变得越来越困难。

title: Converting Binary Floating-Point Numbers to Shortest Decimal Strings
summary:
**Summary of "Converting Binary Floating-Point Numbers to Shortest Decimal Strings"**

This article addresses a fundamental problem in programming language design and data interchange: accurately and efficiently converting binary floating-point numbers (as used in virtually all computers) into the shortest decimal string that will round-trip back to the original binary value. The goal is to produce a human-readable decimal representation that is both precise (no information loss) and concise (no unnecessary trailing digits).

The core challenge lies in the mismatch between binary and decimal bases. A finite binary fraction (e.g., 0.1 in binary) is often an infinitely repeating decimal, and vice-versa. The "shortest" string must correctly identify the point beyond which additional decimal digits are redundant for guaranteeing correct round-trip conversion.

The paper analyzes and builds upon established algorithms, most notably the Grisu family of algorithms (Grisu2, Grisu3) and the Dragonbox algorithm, which are designed for this exact purpose. It discusses the key trade-offs involved:

*   **Correctness:** Ensuring the round-trip property always holds.
*   **Speed:** Minimizing computational overhead during conversion.
*   **Shortness:** Guaranteeing the output decimal string is the mathematically shortest possible.

A significant portion of the work focuses on optimizing the "digit generation" and "rounding decision" steps. The authors delve into efficient methods for determining how many decimal digits are needed and for handling edge cases near rounding boundaries. The discussion involves careful integer arithmetic, precomputed cached powers of ten, and precise error bounds to make these decisions quickly and correctly.

In essence, the article provides a detailed technical exposition on the state-of-the-art algorithms for this critical conversion task, explaining the mathematical foundations and engineering optimizations required to make it both reliable and fast for use in systems like programming language runtimes, JSON parsers, and database interfaces.
chinese_title: 将二进制浮点数转换为最短十进制字符串
chinese_summary:
**《将二进制浮点数转换为最短十进制字符串》概要**

本文探讨了编程语言设计和数据交换中的一个基本问题：如何准确高效地将二进制浮点数（几乎所有计算机都使用）转换为能够无损往返还原的最短十进制字符串。其目标是生成一种既精确（无信息损失）又简洁（无多余尾随数字）的人类可读十进制表示。

核心挑战源于二进制与十进制基数的不匹配。一个有限的二进制小数（例如二进制的0.1）通常对应一个无限循环的十进制小数，反之亦然。"最短"字符串必须准确识别一个临界点，超过该点的额外十进制数字对于保证正确的往返转换而言是冗余的。

本文分析并基于已有算法展开，最著名的是专为此目的设计的Grisu系列算法（Grisu2、Grisu3）和Dragonbox算法。文中讨论了涉及的关键权衡：

*   **正确性：** 确保往返转换特性始终成立。
*   **速度：** 最小化转换过程中的计算开销。
*   **最短性：** 保证输出的十进制字符串是数学上尽可能最短的。

该工作的一个重要部分聚焦于优化"数字生成"和"舍入决策"步骤。作者深入探讨了确定所需十进制数字位数以及处理舍入边界附近边缘情况的高效方法。相关讨论涉及精密的整数运算、预计算的十的幂次缓存以及精确的误差界限，以快速正确地做出这些决策。

本质上，本文针对这一关键转换任务，提供了关于最先进算法的详细技术阐述，解释了使其在编程语言运行时、JSON解析器和数据库接口等系统中既可靠又快速所需的数学基础和工程优化。

title: The Gervais Principle, or the Office According to “The Office” (2009)
summary:
This article introduces the "Gervais Principle," a cynical theory of organizational hierarchy derived from the TV show *The Office*. It posits that companies are divided into three archetypes: **Sociopaths** at the top (ambitious, pragmatic leaders who drive the organization for personal gain), the **Clueless** in middle management (delusional, loyalists who believe in the company's ideals), and **Losers** at the bottom (competent workers who have traded freedom for a stable paycheck but rationally minimize their effort).

The principle states that Sociopaths, acting in their own interest, systematically promote over-performing Losers into the Clueless middle-management layer because their misplaced loyalty makes them useful pawns. Simultaneously, they groom under-performing but ambitious Losers into future Sociopaths, recognizing their pragmatic drive. Average, bare-minimum Losers are left to fend for themselves.

This dynamic creates a lifecycle for firms: Sociopaths start an organization with Losers, add a Clueless layer for stability, and eventually exit with the value, leaving the Clueless to run the hollowed-out company into collapse. The theory is presented as a more accurate, if bleak, alternative to the Peter Principle and Dilbert Principle, arguing that organizations are intrinsically pathological and that promotion logic is based on exploitative calculation, not merit or incompetence.
chinese_title: 格瓦拉原则，或《办公室》中的职场法则（2009）
chinese_summary:
本文介绍了源自电视剧《办公室》的愤世嫉俗组织层级理论——“热尔韦原则”。该理论认为公司可分为三种原型：顶层的**投机者**（野心勃勃、务实求利的领导者，为个人利益驱动组织）、中层管理的**盲从者**（沉溺幻想、忠于公司理念的忠诚派），以及底层的**庸碌者**（用自由换取稳定薪水但理性最小化付出的能干员工）。

该原则指出，投机者为自身利益行事，系统地将表现过优的庸碌者提拔至盲从中层管理层，因其错位的忠诚可成为有用棋子。同时，他们会将表现不佳但野心勃勃的庸碌者培养为未来投机者，看中其实用主义驱动力。而表现平平、仅达最低标准的庸碌者则任其自生自灭。

这种动态构成了企业的生命周期：投机者带领庸碌者创立组织，增加盲从层以维持稳定，最终套现离场，留下盲从者管理被掏空的公司直至崩溃。该理论作为彼得原理与呆伯特理论的替代解读，虽显悲观但更贴近现实，主张组织本质上是病态的，晋升逻辑基于剥削性算计而非能力或无能。

title: The Enterprise Context Layer
summary:
This article introduces the "Enterprise Context Layer" (ECL), a solution for building a central, self-updating AI knowledge base for a company. The author explains that while existing tools like Glean excel at document retrieval, they fail at synthesizing complex organizational context, such as judgment calls, institutional memory, and sensitive information protocols.

The proposed solution uses AI agents (running on ~1000 lines of Python) with access to a GitHub repository and basic search tools. Over two days, 20 parallel agents autonomously built a comprehensive, cross-referenced knowledge base with over 1,000 files. This ECL maps everything from product details and customer journeys to competitive battle cards and internal processes, with every claim rigorously cited to source materials.

A key insight is that the agents learned to prioritize and reconcile information from conflicting sources (e.g., code, Slack, support tickets), developing a meta-awareness of which sources are reliable for different types of information. The resulting layer makes complex question-answering trivial, as it contains not just facts but the nuanced "mental models" used by company experts.

The author concludes that this approach democratizes enterprise AI, suggesting that as LLMs improve, any company can build and maintain a dynamic, truthful representation of its entire operational knowledge.
chinese_title: 企业上下文层
chinese_summary:
本文介绍了“企业上下文层”（ECL），这是一种为企业构建中心化、自我更新的AI知识库的解决方案。作者指出，虽然现有工具（如Glean）擅长文档检索，但在综合复杂的组织上下文（如决策判断、机构记忆和敏感信息处理规范）方面存在不足。

该解决方案采用AI智能体（基于约1000行Python代码实现），使其能够访问GitHub仓库和基础搜索工具。在两天内，20个并行智能体自主构建了一个包含1000多个文件、相互引用的综合性知识库。该ECL涵盖了从产品详情、客户旅程到竞争策略卡和内部流程的所有内容，且每个论断都严格标注了来源材料。

一个关键发现是，智能体学会了优先处理并调和来自冲突来源（如代码库、Slack消息、工单系统）的信息，对不同类型信息的可靠来源形成了元认知。由此构建的层级使复杂问题解答变得轻而易举，因为它不仅包含事实，还融入了公司专家使用的精细“心智模型”。

作者总结认为，这种方法实现了企业AI的普及化，并指出随着大语言模型的进步，任何公司都能构建并维护一个动态、真实反映其整体运营知识的知识体系。

title: Online age-verification tools for child safety are surveilling adults
summary:
This article details how new U.S. state laws requiring online age verification to protect children are leading to widespread surveillance of adults and raising significant privacy concerns. Roughly half of U.S. states now mandate that platforms like social media, gaming, and adult content sites implement these checks, forcing companies to screen all users.

The verification systems often rely on AI-powered facial recognition or ID scans, handled by third-party vendors. While companies aim to minimize data retention, critics warn that collecting sensitive identity information (like faces and government IDs) creates large, attractive targets for hackers and government subpoenas. A recent Discord data breach exposing 70,000 users' ID images highlights the security risks.

Civil liberties advocates argue this undermines a free and open internet by tying immutable personal data to online activity. There is also user backlash against the intrusiveness, with some seeking workarounds that could increase piracy.

Legally, the landscape is unsettled. A federal court recently blocked Virginia's law on First Amendment grounds, even as state and federal regulators insist such laws are necessary and must operate with strict data safeguards. Companies like Discord and Snap are navigating compliance while trying to reduce user friction, with some suggesting age verification should happen at the device or app store level.

The trend is pushing toward a future where a single, persistent digital proof of age could become a permanent, reusable feature for accessing online services, fundamentally changing how identity is linked to internet use.
chinese_title: 保护儿童安全的在线年龄验证工具正在监控成年人。
chinese_summary:
本文详细阐述了美国各州新出台的在线年龄验证法律如何导致对成年人的广泛监控并引发重大隐私担忧。这些旨在保护儿童的法律要求社交媒体、游戏平台和成人内容网站等实施年龄验证，迫使企业对所有用户进行筛查。

验证系统通常依赖第三方供应商提供的人工智能面部识别或身份证扫描技术。尽管企业试图尽量减少数据留存，但批评者警告称，收集敏感身份信息（如面部特征和政府身份证件）会形成庞大而诱人的黑客攻击和政府传票目标。近期Discord数据泄露事件暴露了7万名用户的身份证图像，凸显了此类安全风险。

公民自由倡导者认为，这种做法将不可更改的个人数据与网络活动绑定，破坏了自由开放的互联网环境。用户也对这种侵入性措施表示强烈反对，部分人开始寻找规避方法，这可能助长盗版行为。

从法律角度看，相关领域仍存在不确定性。联邦法院近期以违反第一修正案为由叫停了弗吉尼亚州的相关法律，而州和联邦监管机构则坚称此类法律具有必要性，且必须在严格的数据保护措施下执行。Discord和Snap等企业正在努力平衡合规要求与用户体验，部分建议提出年龄验证应在设备或应用商店层面进行。

这一趋势正推动未来形成单一、持久且可重复使用的数字年龄凭证体系，使其成为访问在线服务的永久性功能，从根本上改变身份信息与互联网使用之间的关联方式。

title: We are building data breach machines and nobody cares
summary:
This article argues that AI agents are being developed with severe, overlooked security risks, comparing them to Dracula—powerful, amoral entities that act without inhibition. The core problem is that agents, which are essentially loops making API calls to LLMs, operate non-deterministically and can cause significant damage, such as deleting data or accessing sensitive systems.

The author highlights that the AI industry is dangerously fragmented, lacking standard APIs or security protocols. Different LLM providers use incompatible tool-calling schemas, and frameworks like LangGraph or CrewAI are not interoperable. This chaos makes building secure, model-agnostic agents extremely difficult. Furthermore, debugging is nearly impossible because agent behavior is unpredictable and model updates can introduce regressions without warning.

Despite these risks, security is being deprioritized, treated as an afterthought rather than a foundational requirement. The article criticizes vague industry calls for "security by design" and cross-coalition standards as insufficient and too slow. It concludes that the only viable defense is to assume the agent itself is untrustworthy and to rigorously verify every action it attempts at the data layer, as the industry is effectively building "data breach machines."
chinese_title: 我们正在制造数据泄露机器，却无人问津。
chinese_summary:
本文指出，人工智能代理的开发正伴随着严重且被忽视的安全风险，并将其比作德古拉——强大、无道德约束且行动不受限制的存在。核心问题在于，代理本质上是通过循环调用大语言模型API的机制，其运行具有非确定性，可能造成重大损害，例如删除数据或访问敏感系统。

作者强调，人工智能行业目前处于危险的碎片化状态，缺乏标准API或安全协议。不同的大语言模型提供商使用互不兼容的工具调用架构，而LangGraph或CrewAI等框架也无法相互协作。这种混乱局面使得构建安全、模型无关的代理变得极其困难。此外，调试几乎不可能实现，因为代理行为难以预测，且模型更新可能在毫无预警的情况下引发功能倒退。

尽管存在这些风险，安全却被降级处理，被视为事后补救而非基础要求。文章批评行业泛泛而谈的“设计即安全”倡议和跨联盟标准既不足够又进展缓慢。文章最终指出，唯一可行的防御措施是假设代理本身不可信，并在数据层严格验证其试图执行的每个动作——因为整个行业实际上正在构建“数据泄露机器”。
